GoalOS LoopState · Restart · Trace · Proof
HomeConciergeLoop RoomProof TheatreEvidenceLegal
Long-running agents · state outside context · proof before continuation

Loops that last
must write state.
GoalOS makes it proof.

A browser-local observatory for agent loops that run beyond one chat session: negotiate the contract, separate roles, write virtual files, survive restarts, read traces, score taste, reduce harness, expose the moving bottleneck, and export a LongLoopDocket.

Open observatory →Open Loop Room
Public-safe simulation. No account, no form submission, no wallet, no token approval, no cookies, no analytics, no browser storage, no network request, no external action, no production authority, no user data wanted.
Operating law

Context is not memory. Trace is memory.

The model may draft and restart. The institution keeps the contract, role charters, disk state, trace roots, evaluator rubric, and stop conditions outside the model’s short context window.

0virtual days
5state files
0restarts
0wallet calls
The loop failure mode

A prompt can forget. A loop must recover.

The page demonstrates a single idea: long-running agent systems become credible only when their state is inspectable, restartable, scored, and claim-bounded. GoalOS turns that into a public-safe proof loop.

01Procedure over prompt
02Contract before generation
03Roles stay separate
04Files outlive context
05Restart is a feature
06Trace before trust
07Score what taste means
08Delete excess harness
09Bottleneck always moves
Browser-local day-scale loop

Run days of agent work in seconds.

All computation is local to this page. The exported docket is a public-safe JSON receipt.

State CONTRACT_NEGOTIATIONTrace root LL-EMPTYVerdict AWAITING_LOOP
Virtual disk
GoalOSLoop
0days
0proof
0events
0restarts
100harness
contractbottleneck
Readable traceNo events yet.
Press “Run 7-day loop” to begin.
Review chamber
0%Docket readiness
Loop not started.

No contract, no trace, no Evidence Docket, no Chronicle.

    The docket is review material only. It does not certify facts, authorize funds, settle work, or activate production authority.

    What this demonstrates

    The long-loop object model.

    loop_contract.mdObjective, constraints, allowed tools, review requirement, done condition, and stop rule.
    progress.mdCurrent day, accepted state, unresolved questions, and next bottleneck.
    log.mdAppend-only trace with day, role, decision, restart, and trace root.
    feature_list.jsonCandidate artifacts, expected proof value, risk, and selection status.
    evidence_docket.jsonClaims, gates, replay path, evaluator scores, public-private boundary, and review status.
    chronicle_entry.jsonOnly accepted proof state enters durable institutional memory.
    Core GoalOS idea

    Not a longer prompt. A governed loop.

    Maximum useful autonomy is not “let the model run forever.” It is a loop that can stop, restart, prove, reject, remember, and expose its next bottleneck under human review.

    Public boundary: this page is a local demonstration only. No private data, no external calls, no wallet, no settlement, no authority.
